notes: Timestamp corrected to UTC from commit time 2026-04-19T10:27:33+02:00. Multiple regeneration cycles of canonical artifacts within a single PR (PR-58) constitute real manual_regen friction. Not a separate run — same PR. Documented as in-PR observation.

context: Commit 7c44b07 fixed .venv/venv exclusion in scripts/docmeta/_paths.py. Prior to fix, canonical generator included virtual environment Python files in docs/_generated/doc-index.md — inflating doc count from 120 to 122. The leak was non-deterministic (present only in dev environments with .venv). Fix: added .venv and venv to SKIP_DIR_NAMES. Canonical artifact (doc-index.md) required a third regeneration within PR-58.
notes: Timestamp corrected to UTC from commit time 2026-04-19T10:52:09+02:00. Real CI-friction data point: canonical generator was producing environment-dependent output, undermining determinism guarantee. This is a direct friction indicator relevant to the hypothesis. Third canonical regeneration in the same PR.
